name: io.github.prashantsinghmangat/tracebug
description: Local stdio MCP server exposing TraceBug bug-report .html files (session replay, console errors, network activity, repro timeline, screenshots) to AI coding agents. All data is read from local disk — zero network connections.

packageArguments.description: Subcommand that starts the MCP server

packageArguments.name: --dir
packageArguments.description: Directory containing TraceBug .html bug-report exports (defaults to the current working directory)
